_comment: Renovate config for organvm/limen (the GITVS conductor). Governed by institutio/github/estate.yaml -> integrations.renovate (status: active); free tier. This is the conductor's live config AND the template scripts/sync-marketplace-config.py fans out. Renovate is already authorized on organvm-i-theoria; extending the install to organvm is L-INTEGRATION-RENOVATE. NOTE: adopting Renovate means retiring .github/dependabot.yml's version-updates to avoid duplicate PRs (keep Dependabot for security alerts only, or remove the config) — that trim is part of the lever.
